body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-22748", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "Vulnerability in Spring Spring Security. When an application configures JWT decoding with NimbusJwtDecoder  or NimbusReactiveJwtDecoder, it must configure an OAuth2TokenValidator<Jwt> separately, for example by calling setJwtValidator. This issue affects Spring Security: from 6.3.0 through 6.3.14, from 6.4.0 through 6.4.14, from 6.5.0 through 6.5.9, from 7.0.0 through 7.0.4.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00203, "percentile": 0.10182}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cvc6-q2cp-2xhw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T20:48:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvc6-q2cp-2xhw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cvc6-q2cp-2xhw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-22748"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T06:16:04Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T06:30:29Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-22748", "https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-22748", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvc6-q2cp-2xhw"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-security", "summary": "Spring Security has Potential Security Misconfiguration when Using withIssuerLocation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T20:48:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cvc6-q2cp-2xhw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.security:spring-security-oauth2-jose"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.3.0, <= 6.3.14"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.security:spring-security-oauth2-jose"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.4.0, <= 6.4.14"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.5.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.security:spring-security-oauth2-jose"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.5.0, <= 6.5.9"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.security:spring-security-oauth2-jose"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 7.0.0, <= 7.0.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
